member.name: T:System.Runtime.Serialization.ISerializationCodeDomSurrogateProvider
member.summary: Represents a DataContract surrogate provider that is capable of modifying generated type code using .

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.ISerializationCodeDomSurrogateProvider.ProcessImportedType(System.CodeDom.CodeTypeDeclaration,System.CodeDom.CodeCompileUnit)
member.summary: Processes the type that has been generated from the imported schema.
member.param: A to process that represents the type declaration generated during schema import.
The that contains the other code generated during schema import.
member.returns: A that contains the processed type.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions
member.summary: Represents the options that can be set on an .
member.remarks: The is used to generate code from XML schema using the .NET CodeDOM. To generate an XML schema from an assembly, use the .

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.CodeProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a instance that provides the means to check whether particular options for a target language are supported.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.EnableDataBinding
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether types in generated code should implement the interface.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.DataContractSurrogate
member.summary: Gets or sets a data contract surrogate provider that can be used to modify the code generated during an import operation.
member.remarks: The interface type for this option is ISerializationSurrogateProvider, but to take full advantage of the imported code modification abilities, using an ISerializationSurrogateProvider2 that also implements is recommended.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.GenerateInternal
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether generated code will be marked internal or public.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.GenerateSerializable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether generated data contract classes will be marked with the attribute in addition to the attribute.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.ImportXmlType
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether all XML schema types, even those that do not conform to a data contract schema, will be imported.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.Namespaces
member.summary: Gets a dictionary that contains the mapping of data contract namespaces to the CLR namespaces that must be used to generate code during an import operation.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.ReferencedCollectionTypes
member.summary: Gets a collection of types that represents data contract collections that should be referenced when generating code for collections, such as lists or dictionaries of items.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.ImportOptions.ReferencedTypes
member.summary: Gets a containing types referenced in generated code.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter
member.summary: Allows the transformation of a set of XML schema files (.xsd) into common language runtime (CLR) types.
member.remarks:
Use the if you are creating a Web service that must interoperate with an existing Web service, or to create data contract types from XML schemas. will transform a set of XML schemas and create the .NET Framework types that represent the data contract in a selected programming language. To create the code, use the classes in the namespace.
Conversely, use the class when you have created a Web service that incorporates data represented by CLR types and when you need to export XML schemas for each data type to be consumed by other Web services.That is, transforms a set of CLR types into a set of XML schemas.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.#ctor(System.CodeDom.CodeCompileUnit)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the that will be used to generate CLR code.
member.param: The that will be used to store the code.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets an that contains settable options for the import operation.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.CodeCompileUnit
member.summary: Gets a used for storing the CLR types generated.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.Import(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet)
member.summary: Transforms the specified set of XML schemas contained in an into a .
member.param: A that contains the schema representations to generate CLR types for.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.Import(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName})
member.summary: Transforms the specified set of schema types contained in an into CLR types generated into a .
member.param: A that contains the schema representations.
The set of schema types to import.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.Import(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName)
member.summary: Transforms the specified XML schema type contained in an into a .
member.param: A that contains the schema representations.
A that represents a specific schema type to import.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.Import(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaElement)
member.summary: Transforms the specified schema element in the set of specified XML schemas into a and returns an that represents the data contract name for the specified element.
member.param: An that contains the schemas to transform.
An that represents the specific schema element to transform.
member.returns: An that represents the specified element.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.CanImport(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet)
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the schemas contained in an can be transformed into a .
member.param: A that contains the schemas to transform.
member.returns: if the schemas can be transformed to data contract types; otherwise, .

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.CanImport(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName})
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the specified set of types contained in an can be transformed into CLR types generated into a .
member.param: The schemas to transform.
The set of schema types to import.
member.returns: if the schemas can be transformed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.CanImport(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName)
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the schemas contained in an can be transformed into a .
member.param: The schema representations.
The names of the schema types that need to be imported from the .
member.returns: if the schemas can be transformed to data contract types; otherwise, .

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.CanImport(System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet,System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaElement)
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether a specific schema element contained in an can be imported.
member.param: An to import.
A specific to check in the set of schemas.
member.returns: if the element can be imported; otherwise, .

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.GetCodeTypeReference(System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName)
member.summary: Returns a to the CLR type generated for the schema type with the specified .
member.param: The that specifies the schema type to look up.
member.returns: A reference to the CLR type generated for the schema type with the typeName specified.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.GetCodeTypeReference(System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName,System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaElement)
member.summary: Returns a for the specified XML qualified element and schema element.
member.param: An that specifies the XML qualified name of the schema type to look up.
An that specifies an element in an XML schema.
member.returns: A that represents the type that was generated for the specified schema type.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.Serialization.XsdDataContractImporter.GetKnownTypeReferences(System.Xml.XmlQualifiedName)
member.summary: Returns a list of objects that represents the known types generated when generating code for the specified schema type.
member.param: An that represents the schema type to look up known types for.

member.name: P:System.SR.AnnotationAttributeNotFound
member.summary: Invalid '{0}' annotation in type '{1}' from namespace '{2}'. Attribute '{3}' not present.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotExportNullAssembly
member.summary: Cannot export null assembly provided via '{0}' parameter.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotExportNullKnownType
member.summary: Cannot export null type provided via KnownTypesCollection.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotExportNullType
member.summary: Cannot export null type provided via '{0}' parameter.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotSetMembersForReferencedType
member.summary: Existing type '{0}' specified via the referenced types collection has been referenced in the generated code. Members cannot be added for this type since it cannot be modified.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotSetNamespaceForReferencedType
member.summary: Existing type '{0}' specified via the referenced types collection has been referenced in the generated code. Cannot set namespace for this type since it cannot be modified.

member.name: P:System.SR.GenericTypeNotExportable
member.summary: Type '{0}' cannot be exported as a schema type because it is an open generic type. You can only export a generic type if all its generic parameter types are actual types.

member.name: P:System.SR.TypeHasNotBeenImported
member.summary: Type '{0}' from namespace '{1}' has not been imported from schema. Consider first importing this type by calling one of the Import methods on XsdDataContractImporter.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotComputeUniqueName
member.summary: A unique name cannot be computed for '{0}' because there are already Int32.MaxValue types of with the same name.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotDeriveFromSealedReferenceType
member.summary: Type with data contract name '{0}' in namespace '{1}' cannot be imported. Cannot derive from sealed referenced type '{2}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotUseGenericTypeAsBase
member.summary: Collection type cannot be generated for type '{0}' from namespace '{1}'. Cannot use a generic list type as a base type because the language does not support generic type references.

member.name: P:System.SR.CircularTypeReference
member.summary: It contains a circular reference for type '{0}' from namespace '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.CLRNamespaceMappedMultipleTimes
member.summary: CLR namespace '{2}' has already been mapped to data contract namespace '{0}'. It cannot be mapped to another data contract namespace '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.InvalidClrNameGeneratedForISerializable
member.summary: ISerializable type with data contract name '{0}' in namespace '{1}' cannot be imported. The data contract name cannot be customized for ISerializable type and the generated name '{2}' does not match the expected name '{0}'. Check if the required name has b ...

member.name: P:System.SR.InvalidClrNamespaceGeneratedForISerializable
member.summary: ISerializable type with data contract name '{0}' in namespace '{1}' cannot be imported. The data contract namespace cannot be customized for ISerializable types and the generated namespace '{3}' does not match the required CLR namespace '{2}'. Check if the ...

member.name: P:System.SR.ReferencedBaseTypeDoesNotExist
member.summary: Collection type cannot be generated for type '{0}' from namespace '{1}'. Rename the type to '{2}' in namespace '{3}' or reference an existing collection type that implements '{4}' or '{5}' which can be used as a base type for the generated collection.

member.name: P:System.SR.ReferencedTypeDoesNotMatch
member.summary: Referenced type '{0}' with data contract name '{1}' in namespace '{2}' cannot be used since it does not match imported DataContract. Need to exclude this type from referenced types.

member.name: P:System.SR.TypeCannotBeImported
member.summary: Type '{0}' in namespace '{1}' cannot be imported. {2}

member.name: P:System.SR.TypeMustBeIXmlSerializable
member.summary: Schema type '{2}' in namespace '{3}' must be imported as an XML type. Type '{0}' cannot be mapped to this schema type because it does not implement '{1}'. Consider not adding type '{0}' to the list of referenced types or changing it to implement '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.UnexpectedContractType
member.summary: An internal error has occurred. Unexpected contract type '{0}' for type '{1}' encountered.
